title: Engineering Design: Electrical Engineering
outline: This course aims to assign students to a design problem relevant to the Electrical Engineering discipline within which they will need to design a prototype and test a sub-system. This will provide insight to understand the intricacies of real-life complex sub system design. Students will be expected to solve a problem methodically using the skills they have gathered over the previous semesters of the curriculum, especially from the Design Principles course.
lecture_times: See departmental timetable and official class schedule.
dp_requirements: Please refer to the official course handout document for detailed information regarding the DP requirements for this course.
assessment: Please refer to the official course handout document regarding the assessment criteria for this course.
